Tests that WebMCP toolInvoked and toolResponded events fire correctly.
Enabling WebMCP Domain
Executing imperative tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 0>
    toolName : imperative_tool
}
Responded {
    invocationId : <string 0>
    output : {
        text_was : hello
    }
    status : Completed
}
Executing declarative tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 1>
    toolName : declarative_tool
}
Responded {
    invocationId : <string 1>
    output : {
        declarative : success
    }
    status : Completed
}
Executing declarative array tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 2>
    toolName : declarative_array_tool
}
Responded {
    invocationId : <string 2>
    output : [
        [0] : array
        [1] : result
    ]
    status : Completed
}
Array Result from executeTool:
{
    id : <number>
    result : {
        result : {
            type : string
            value : "[\"array\",\"result\"]"
        }
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
Executing declarative string tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 3>
    toolName : declarative_string_tool
}
Responded {
    invocationId : <string 3>
    output : string result
    status : Completed
}
String Result from executeTool:
{
    id : <number>
    result : {
        result : {
            type : string
            value : "string result"
        }
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
Executing declarative number tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 4>
    toolName : declarative_number_tool
}
Responded {
    invocationId : <string 4>
    output : 42
    status : Completed
}
Number Result from executeTool:
{
    id : <number>
    result : {
        result : {
            type : string
            value : "42"
        }
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
Executing failing JS tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 5>
    toolName : failing_js_tool
}
Responded {
    errorText :
    exception : {
        className : Error
        description : Error: JS Error     at failing_js (<anonymous>:33:48)     at window.executeFailingJS (<anonymous>:79:49)     at <anonymous>:1:8
        objectId : <string>
        subtype : error
        type : object
    }
    invocationId : <string 5>
    status : Error
}
Executing failing ModelContext tool (invalid JSON)...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : invalid json
    invocationId : <string 6>
    toolName : imperative_tool
}
Responded {
    errorText : Failed to parse input arguments
    invocationId : <string 6>
    status : Error
}
Executing cancelled tool...
Invoked {
    frameId : <string>
    input : {"text":"hello"}
    invocationId : <string 7>
    toolName : abortable_tool
}
Responded {
    errorText :
    invocationId : <string 7>
    status : Canceled
}
